title: Cabbage Glasses
description: A resource pack for Patbox's Brewery and Cabbage Substances
body:
This resource pack replaces the boring potion bottles the [Patbox's Brewery](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewery) have with custom glasses. Also compatible with [Cabbage Substances.](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cabbage-substances).

### There are 2 versions of the resource pack
- **Polymer.**
It utilises Polymer's pack hosting.
- **Vanilla.**
It replaces vanilla's potion model.

Works for Brewery 0.10.x+.
For 0.8.x-0.9.x must use Cabbage Substances.
